judgment.summary: Arista Networks exhibits robust growth, high profitability, and a pristine balance sheet, trading at a premium justified by its market position.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus by 7.7%; next earnings date is 2026-08-04.
positives: Revenue growth 35.1% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Operating margin 42.7% and Profit margin 38.3% — industry-leading profitability.
Return on equity 31.5% — highly efficient capital deployment.
Total debt $0 and Free cash flow $4.36B TTM — exceptionally strong balance sheet and cash generation.
Analyst consensus is strong buy with a mean target of $188.20.
negatives: Trailing P/E 49.58 and Forward P/E 32.42 — valuation reflects high growth expectations.
PEG ratio 1.82 — suggests growth may be priced in.
Beta 1.67 — stock exhibits higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: Arista Networks (ANET) is being highlighted as a key player in AI data center networking upgrades and a potential "pick-and-shovel" play for the AI boom. Recent analysis also points to the company as a strong candidate among low-leverage stocks. These narratives suggest continued investor interest in ANET's role within the expanding AI infrastructure landscape.
